title: LockyLocks
description: Secure your treasures with durable locks and forged keys, a personal touch of protection.
body: # 🔒 LockyLocks Secure your containers with style and control! LockyLocks is a lightweight yet powerful utility mod that lets you **lock containers like Chests, Barrels, and Shulker Boxes** using customizable **locks** and **keys**. ## ✨ Features **🧱 Two Types of Locks**: 1. **Iron Lock**: More durable, lasts maximum **36 Minecraft days**. 2. **Copper Lock**: Less durable, lasts maximum **24 Minecraft days**. **🗝️ One Key to Unlock Each Lock**: - Only one key type currently: **Iron Key**. - Key must have **exact same name** as the lock (case-sensitive) **and be used by the player who locked it**. - Even if someone else gets a correctly named key, **they can’t unlock it unless they are the owner**. **🛡️ Break Protection**: - By default, locked containers **cannot be broken**. - Can be toggled via config file: - _**/config/lockylocks-common.toml**_ → ``` protectLockedContainers = false ``` - to disable protection. **⚙️ Durability Mechanics**: - **Locks wear down** daily while active. Once broken, the container unlocks automatically. - **Keys can be used 35 times** before breaking. **📦 Supported Containers**: - Works with **Chests, Double Chests, Barrels,** and **Shulker Boxes**. ## 📸 Recipes - Please see the **Gallery** section ## ⚒️ Configurable Options Located in: ``` /config/lockylocks-common.toml ``` Available settings: ``` protectLockedContainers = true ``` → Set to **false** if you want players to break locked containers. **☕ Fuel My Code with Coffee!** Liked the mod? Keep me caffeinated and semi-functional 😴 by dropping a coffee here. Thanks, you legend! 😎
